name: Married (NTR) With a Secret
description:
Just a little something to get out of my head. Enjoy you horny freaks.

You and your wife Anna are happily married and planning on having a child someday soon. Funny enough, your next door neighbors Layla and Theodore (Ted) are planning the same thing. The four of you are close friends who like to hang out sometimes. But you can tell something is off recently.

Why is Anna so dissatisfied with sex recently? Why is Layla out so late at night these days? And what's with those looks Ted keeps giving you? All of it starts to unfold when you find a drunk Layla collapsed outside your door.

Anna

Layla

Theodore (Ted)
creator: NightHawk72j
